active_plan.description: Relative path to active plan file (from artifacts/). Supports cross-project prefix: @{ecosystem}/plans/xxx.md resolves to Projects/{ecosystem}/artifacts/plans/xxx.md. Null or empty when no plan is active.

has_rules.description: DEPRECATED (v1.6.2): Use 'agent' map instead. Kept for backward compatibility — /open checks agent.rules first, falls back to has_rules.

agent.description: Agent configuration map for project-level indices. Replaces has_rules (v1.6.2). Null or absent for projects with no custom agent config.

rules.description: Whether this project has a custom rules index in .agent/rules.md.

skills.description: Whether this project has a custom skills index in .agent/skills.md.

type.description: Project type. 'ecosystem' coordinates satellites (no code). 'meta-project' produces code AND coordinates satellites. Default: standard.

ecosystem.description: Name of the parent ecosystem (meta-project slug). Set on satellite projects to link them to their ecosystem. Null for standalone or ecosystem projects.

satellites.description: List of satellite project slugs coordinated by this project. Valid when type is 'ecosystem' or 'meta-project'. Null for standard projects.

strategy.description: Path to strategy doc. Relative from project root (e.g., 'docs/strategy/strategy.md'). Supports cross-project prefix: @{ecosystem}/docs/strategy.md resolves to Projects/{ecosystem}/docs/strategy.md. Null or empty when no strategy exists.

roadmap.description: Path to roadmap file. Relative from artifacts/ (e.g., 'plans/ecosystem-roadmap.md'). Supports cross-project prefix: @{ecosystem}/plans/xxx-roadmap.md resolves to Projects/{ecosystem}/artifacts/plans/xxx-roadmap.md. Null or empty when no roadmap exists.
